---
title: "Metropolis Random Walk"
description: "Explore random walks using the Metropolis algorithm and observe how particles move through space."
date: "2025-01-04"
categories: [random-walk, mcmc, visualization]
image: "images/metropolis-random-walk.svg"
page-layout: full
sidebar: false
toc: false
---

[← Return to Apps](index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
#| cache: false
import importlib.util
from pathlib import Path

script_path = Path("metropolis random walk/metropolis_random_walk_precompute.py")
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("mrw_precompute", script_path)
module = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(module)
module.write_data("metropolis random walk/metropolis_random_walk_data.json", max_n=1000, runs_per_combo=3)
```

```{=html}
<style>
  #quarto-content .content, main.content { max-width: min(1800px, 96vw) !important; }
  #quarto-margin-sidebar, nav#TOC, #TOC-container { display: none !important; }
  .controls { background:white; padding:20px; border-radius:8px; box-shadow:0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.1); margin-bottom:16px; }
  .control-group { margin:10px 0; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:15px; }
  .control-group label { min-width:200px; font-weight:500; }
  .control-group .value { min-width:80px; font-weight:bold; color:#2563eb; }
  #canvas { width:100%; max-width:900px; border-radius:8px; box-shadow:0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.1); background:white; }
  .diag-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit,minmax(360px,1fr)); gap: 14px; margin-top: 14px; }
  .diag-card { background:white; border-radius:8px; box-shadow:0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.1); padding: 8px; }
  .diag-card h4 { margin: 6px 8px 2px; font-size: 0.95rem; }
  .diag-svg { width:100%; height:280px; }
</style>

<div class="controls">
  <div class="control-group">
    <label for="d-slider">Proposal Side Length d:</label>
    <input type="range" id="d-slider" min="0.1" max="2" step="0.1" value="0.5">
    <span class="value" id="d-value">0.5</span>
  </div>
  <div class="control-group">
    <label for="n-slider">Number of Samples:</label>
    <input type="range" id="n-slider" min="10" max="1000" step="5" value="50">
    <span class="value" id="n-value">50</span>
  </div>
  <div class="control-group">
    <label for="start-select">Starting Point:</label>
    <select id="start-select"></select>
  </div>
  <div class="control-group">
    <button id="resample-btn" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">Resample</button>
  </div>
</div>

<canvas id="canvas"></canvas>

<div class="diag-grid">
  <div class="diag-card">
    <h4>Running Averages of Coordinates</h4>
    <svg id="mrw-running-svg" class="diag-svg"></svg>
  </div>
  <div class="diag-card">
    <h4>Autocorrelation Functions (ACF)</h4>
    <svg id="mrw-acf-svg" class="diag-svg"></svg>
  </div>
</div>

<div style="background:white; padding:18px; border-radius:8px; box-shadow:0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.1); margin-top:16px;">
  <h3>Statistics</h3>
  <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr)); gap:12px;">
    <div><div>Acceptance Rate</div><div id="stat-acceptance" style="font-weight:bold;">-</div></div>
    <div><div>Accepted / Total</div><div id="stat-accepted" style="font-weight:bold;">-</div></div>
    <div><div>ESS (X)</div><div id="stat-ess-x" style="font-weight:bold;">-</div></div>
    <div><div>ESS (Y)</div><div id="stat-ess-y" style="font-weight:bold;">-</div></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script type="module">
  import { initMetropolisRandomWalkApp } from './metropolis random walk/metropolis_random_walk_d3_app.js';
  initMetropolisRandomWalkApp().catch((err) => console.error('Failed to initialize app:', err));
</script>
```
